name: office
description: Office is a curated company operating system for coding agents: issue-first specs, departments, hiring, fresh-context verification, lessons, and multi-CLI layouts.

interface.shortDescription: A company operating system for coding agents.
interface.longDescription: Deploys an issue-first agent company into any repository: self-contained specs, department charters, hiring offers, model-class routing, weak-dispatch for cheap executors, fresh-context verification, lessons, rituals, and generated layouts for Claude, Codex, Gemini, OpenCode, and generic AGENTS.md.
defaultPrompt: /office Goal: set up an agent company in this repository
/solve Fix this one-off task without company bootstrap
Run a fresh-context verification before closing the issue
